song_name: Misc Praise Songs - Amazing Grace - Rachel Platten - Fight Song
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Amazing grace how sweet the sound[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
That saved a wretch like me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And all those things I didn’t say[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Wrecking balls inside my brain[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I will scream them loud tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Can you hear my voice this time?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
This is my fight song[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Take back my life song[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
Prove I’m alright song[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
My power’s turned on[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Starting right now I’ll be strong[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
I’ll play my fight song[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
And I don’t really care if nobody else believes[/tab]
[tab]        N.C.                         [ch]G[/ch]
Cause I’ve still got a lot of fight left in me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]
I once was lost[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
But now I am found[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
It’s been 24 years I miss my home[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
There’s a fire burning in my bones[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
And I still believe[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah I still believe[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And all those things I didn’t say[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Wrecking balls inside my brain[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I will scream them loud tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Can you hear my voice this time?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
This is my fight song[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Take back my life song[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
Prove I’m alright song[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
My power’s turned on[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Starting right now I’ll be strong[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
I’ll play my fight song[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
And I don’t really care if nobody else believes[/tab]
[tab]        N.C.                         [ch]G[/ch]
Cause I’ve still got a lot of fight left in me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Like a small boat on the ocean[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Sending big waves into motion[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Like how a single word can make a heart open[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]         N.C
I might only have one match but I can make an explosion[/tab]
